addSource.title: Add sources
addSource.description: Sources let SolomindLM base its responses on the information that matters most to you.
addSource.descriptionExamples: (Examples: marketing plans, course reading, research notes, meeting transcripts, sales documents, etc.)
addSource.supportedFormats: Supported file types: PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Text, Markdown, JSON, CSV, PNG, JPEG, AVIF, WAV, MP3, M4A, WebM, FLAC
addSource.authRequiredBody: Please log in and select a notebook to upload sources.
addSource.limitReachedBody: You've reached the maximum of {{count}} sources. Remove some sources to add new ones.

discover.title: Discover sources
discover.searchPlaceholder: Search for articles, papers, or websites...
discover.searchingSubtitle: Finding the most relevant sources for you.
discover.emptyState: Enter a topic to discover related sources
discover.noSourcesFound: No sources found. Try a different query or adjust your filters.
discover.oaPdfTooltip: An open-access PDF is available. We try to ingest it; some repositories block automated downloads.

sourcesPanel.deleteSourceBody: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
sourcesPanel.deleteSourcesBody: Delete {{count}} selected source(s)? This cannot be undone.
sourcesPanel.refreshSourcesBody: Re-fetch {{count}} remote source(s)? Web pages and Google Drive imports will be updated.
sourcesPanel.refreshSkipped: {{count}} Drive source(s) skipped (sign in with Google to refresh)
sourcesPanel.refreshNoSources: No web or Google Drive sources to refresh in this notebook.
sourcesPanel.importFailed: Failed to import "{{name}}" from Google Drive

sourceList.reFetchTitle: Re-fetch web pages and Google Drive imports
sourceList.noSources: No sources yet. Add your first source to get started.

sourceViewer.failedToProcessBody: There was an error while processing this document. Please try uploading it again.
sourceViewer.failedToLoadBody: The content will automatically reload when available. Please ensure you are logged in.

pdfViewer.pageInputTitle: Type a page number and press Enter

urlInput.title: Add Website
urlInput.placeholder: https://example.com ... Separate multiple URLs with spaces or new lines
urlInput.invalidUrl: Please enter at least one valid URL (starting with http:// or https://).

socialMediaInput.title: Add Video URL
socialMediaInput.description: Paste video URLs to extract their transcripts. Supports YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and X (Twitter). Separate multiple URLs with spaces or new lines.
socialMediaInput.placeholder: Paste URL from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, or X... Separate multiple URLs with spaces or new lines
socialMediaInput.invalidUrl: Please enter at least one valid URL (starting with http:// or https://).

manualPaper.title: Add Paper Manually
manualPaper.description: Enter paper details manually. Title and authors are required.

doiInput.title: Import from DOI
doiInput.description: Enter a DOI to automatically fetch paper metadata.

bibtexImport.title: Import BibTeX or RIS
bibtexImport.description: Paste your BibTeX or RIS formatted reference below.
bibtexImport.placeholder: Paste BibTeX or RIS content here...
bibtexImport.papersMissingDoi: {{count}} paper missing DOI. These may have limited metadata.
bibtexImport.papersMissingDoi_plural: {{count}} papers missing DOI. These may have limited metadata.

mendeleyImport.title: Import from Mendeley
mendeleyImport.instructions: Export your Mendeley library as BibTeX, then upload the file below.
mendeleyImport.clickToUpload: Click to upload .bib file from Mendeley
mendeleyImport.allAlreadyInNotebook: All papers from this file are already in your notebook.

zoteroImport.title: Import from Zotero
zoteroImport.instructions: Export your Zotero library as BibTeX, then upload the file below.
zoteroImport.clickToUpload: Click to upload .bib file from Zotero
zoteroImport.allAlreadyInNotebook: All papers from this file are already in your notebook.
